profiles.name: Default Live Map
profiles.description: Balanced dark tactical OpenStreetMap configuration for map/, maps/, and live-map/.

profiles.name: Realtime Fractional
profiles.description: Fastest frontend polling mode for local testing and active crawler diagnostics.

profiles.name: Realtime 1 Second
profiles.description: One-second refresh profile for active crawler monitoring without fractional polling.

profiles.name: Live Monitoring
profiles.description: Fast live operations profile for normal public-facing node-map updates.

profiles.name: Rapid Operations
profiles.description: Ten-second tactical monitoring profile for high-activity crawling windows.

profiles.name: Quiet Operations
profiles.description: Low-noise dark tactical profile for stable dashboards and wall displays.

profiles.name: Analysis
profiles.description: Slower, richer review profile for dense overlays, investigation, reports, and comparison work.

profiles.name: Timeline 24H
profiles.description: Timeline playback profile for 24-hour map scrubbing and node appearance/disappearance replay.

profiles.name: Timeline Weekly
profiles.description: Timeline playback profile for weekly network evolution and regional churn review.

profiles.name: Offline Archive
profiles.description: No-polling static archive mode for historical snapshots, GitHub Pages review, and exported reports.
